creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
I see the following on my system:
ldadocgen@deblndw013x2j:/usr/local/share
$ tree man
man
├── man3
│   ├── libpng.3.gz
│   └── libpngpf.3.gz
├── man5
│   └── png.5.gz
└── mandoc.db

3 directories, 4 files

(All) other ports have moved to /usr/local/man at some point in time. Obviously --mandir must not start with --datadir, but with --prefix I guess? ${LOCALBASE}/man?

The port uses CMake, AFAIC, flags need to change. Please fix the MANDIR.
